meta.title: Attacking and Protecting The Edge
meta.description: Stephen Chasko on S4x22’s Stage 2: Technical Deep Dives talks about security controls you should look for in your embedded devices at the edge (or really any embedded device. Some of the items covered are flash encryption, signed firmware, test code, JTAGs, various parts of the SDL, avoiding key injection, and more.
